testcase.name: test_05_sexec_forbidden_on_partner_pa

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 on cross-owner GET; got 200 body={"id":"4890e681-6869-4044-ac97-8a7de76698c2","pa_number":"PA-20260513-4890E6","partner_id":"b2d10ad1-9285-4d8a-bcfe-0f5533330447","partner_name":"Partner User","created_by_user_id":"b2d10ad1-9285-4d8a assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase4a_sales_workflow.py:150: in test_05_sexec_forbidden_on_partner_pa assert r.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 on cross-owner GET; got {r.status_code} body={r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 on cross-owner GET; got 200 body={"id":"4890e681-6869-4044-ac97-8a7de76698c2","pa_number":"PA-20260513-4890E6","partner_id":"b2d10ad1-9285-4d8a-bcfe-0f5533330447","partner_name":"Partner User","created_by_user_id":"b2d10ad1-9285-4d8a E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
